title: mypy: 4 untyped-decorator errors in tui/app.py
description:
4 untyped-decorator errors in src/lichen/tui/app.py:
- Lines 329, 360, 409, 451 - decorators making functions _connect_to_sim, _disconnect, _transmit, _receive untyped

These are Textual decorators without type hints. Fix: Add # type: ignore[misc] or provide local type stubs for Textual decorators.
